title: RICEDUO 24 Pack Christmas Craft Paper Treat Bags, 8 Assorted Christmas Designs Party Favors Bags with 24 Pieces Cute Stickers, Small Xmas Gift Bags for Holiday Party Decorations, 22x13x8 CM
features: Convenient & Spacious 24-Pack Set: Get the ultimate value with 24 Christmas goodie bags (8.66"x5.1"x3.15")—perfect for gifts, treats, and holiday favors! Each bag fits small to medium items like candies, ornaments, or gift cards, making wrapping effortless. No more last-minute scrambling!

8 Festive Designs for Every Style: Spread holiday cheer with 8 unique Christmas patterns (6 each): Santa Claus, Christmas tree, snowman, Christmas car, Christmas gift box, Christmas socks, and reindeer. Mix and match for parties or Advent calendars!

Durable & Eco-Friendly Kraft Paper: Made of thick white kraft paper, these bags are sturdy enough to reuse throughout the season. Holds shape without tearing—ideal for heavier treats like mini bottles or baked goods. Recyclable and planet-friendly!

Perfect for Any Festive Occasion: Beyond Christmas: Great for birthdays, weddings, school events, and winter celebrations. Use as party favors, stocking stuffers, or DIY craft bases. A must-have for busy hosts and teachers!

Instant Holiday Magic: Transform gifts into eye-catching displays with these elegant white bags. Rich designs (like holly leaves and penguins) create a cozy, festive atmosphere that delights guests of all ages. Holiday joy—ready in seconds!
description: Riceduo 24 Pack 12 Assorted Christmas Goody Paper Bags for Classrooms Party Favors, Small Holiday Kraft Pouches for Candy Cookies Gifts Xmas Decorations Deck the Halls with Easy Gift-Giving! Our 24-pack Christmas flat paper bags take the stress out of holiday wrapping while adding festive flair to every present. Designed for convenience and style, these sturdy treat pouches feature joyful patterns that capture the magic of the season—from jolly Santas to whimsical snowmen and twinkling trees. ﻿ Why Choose These Holiday Gift Bags? ✨ Thoughtful Design – Each 8.66"L x 5.1"W x 3.15"H bag offers ample space for treats or small gifts. The flat base prevents tipping, while pre-attached handles ensure comfortable carrying. ﻿ ✨ Durable & Practical – Constructed from 120gsm kraft paper with reinforced stress points. Holds heavier items like mini wine bottles or bath sets without tearing. ﻿ ✨ Instant Holiday Vibes – 6 unique designs (24 total bags) provide variety for classroom gift exchanges or Advent calendar countdowns. Coordinates with most Christmas décor themes. ﻿ ✨ Eco-Conscious Celebrating – Bags are recyclable and printed with soy-based inks. A greener alternative to plastic gift wrap. ﻿ Creative Usage Ideas: Party Favors: Fill with homemade cookies or hot cocoa mix for neighbor gifts Advent Calendar: Number bags 1-24 and hang as a reusable countdown display Teacher/Co-worker Gifts: Perfect for small tokens like ornaments or gift cards Craft Projects: Decorate with stamps or glitter for personalized touches ﻿ Specifications: Material: Premium kraft paper Capacity: 0.5 quarts (holds 15-20 standard candy canes) Weight Limit: 2 lbs per bag Included: 24 bags (3 each of 8 designs) ﻿ Make Your Holidays Merry & Bright! Skip the messy wrapping paper this year—our Christmas bags deliver instant presentation-ready packaging with cheerful designs everyone will love. Order today and check gift-giving off your list!
